canonical_question: What are the most common Android app crash patterns and fixes?
aliases: Why does my Android app keep crashing?
How to debug NullPointerException on Android?
How to fix OutOfMemoryError in Android apps?
constraints: Native crashes (SIGSEGV/SIGABRT) require debug symbols — release builds strip symbols by default
ANR thresholds are enforced by the OS: 5s for input dispatch, ~20s for broadcast receivers in background
Never catch Throwable or Error in production — only catch specific Exception subclasses
Google Play flags apps exceeding 1.09% user-perceived crash rate, affecting discoverability

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Crash is in a third-party SDK or library you do not control
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Contact the SDK vendor; use Crashlytics breadcrumbs to isolate SDK frames

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Crash only occurs on rooted/modified devices
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Device-specific issues — check SafetyNet/Play Integrity attestation first

inputs_needed.question: Is this a Java/Kotlin exception, a native (NDK) crash, or an ANR?
Can you paste the full stack trace or logcat output?
